characters.name: "Cannonball" Taffy O'Jones
characters.description: "Cannonball" Taffy O'Jones is an insane Welsh cricketer. After a deliberate bowl to Richie's forehead, Richie and Eddie steal his car and steal his honeymoon in weekend.

characters.name: "Skullcrusher" Henderson
characters.description: "Skullcrusher" Henderson (played by Nick Scott) is the most prolific currency forger in London, although this is more down to his tendency to crush the skulls of any rivals than the quality of his forgeries (which feature Danny La Rue in place of the Queen). Richie and Eddie fell afoul of Skullcrusher and had to pay a £5,000 tribute in order to escape bodily harm; unfortunately they tried to pay Skullcrusher with his own forged cash, and got their skulls crushed anyway. Appeared in Dough.

characters.name: Dick Head
characters.description: Dick Head(played by Lee Cornes) is the landlord of the Lamb and Flag, Richie and Eddie's regular pub. Dick is one that usually doesn't get on well with both Richie and Eddie, because of the arguments over the tabs and payments for alcohol. He also has a niece namedVeronica, who briefly worked as a barmaid at The Lamb and Flag. His appearances were inSmells,ParadeandDough.

characters.name: Eddie
characters.description: EddieCharacter InformationFull NameEdward HitlerAge33OccupationUnemployedResidenceThe Flat, Hammersmith, LondonApperancesAppears In18 EpisodesFirst Apperance"Smells"Last Apperance"Carnival"Portrayed ByAde Edmondson Edward "Eddie" Hitler is one of the two main characters in Bottom. He is a cheerfully violent achoholic. Eddie wears glasses, a brown suit and a white shirt with a black spotted tie (Which he tucks inside his trousers) on closer inspection one can see that Eddie’s suit jacket and trousers have several stains and frays. Despite having a shaven head, he has sideburns.

characters.name: Eddie
characters.description: EddieCharacter InformationFull NameEdward HitlerAge33OccupationUnemployedResidenceThe Flat, Hammersmith, LondonApperancesAppears In18 EpisodesFirst Apperance"Smells"Last Apperance"Carnival"Portrayed ByAde Edmondson Edward "Eddie" Hitler is one of the two main characters in Bottom. characters.name: Falklands ex-serviceman
characters.description: Falklands ex-serviceman (played by Robert Llewellyn) The Falklands ex-serviceman was in the Lamb and Flag, who asks questions to Richie about his false adventures at the Falklands. After this Richie and Eddie find out he has a wooden leg which is quite valuable and decide to steal it and take to the pawn shop to bet on a horse. He appears in Parade.

characters.name: Harry The Bastard
characters.description: Harry The Bastard is a mean spirited pawnbroker who knowingly and brazenly offers prices for items proffered at well below their true worth. Examples include 7 pence for a house and £1.50 for an engraved wooden leg he acknowledges to be worth at least £2500.

characters.name: Mr. Harrison
characters.description: Mr. Harrison(played by Roger Sloman) is Richie and Eddie's flat landlord and shopkeeper. His only appearances were in 's Up and Holy.

characters.name: Richie
characters.description: RichieCharacter InformationFull NameRichard RichardAge32OccupationUnemployedResidenceThe Flat, Hammersmith, LondonApperancesAppears In18 EpisodesFirst Apperance"Smells"Last Apperance"Carnival"Portrayed ByRik Mayall Richard "Richie" Richardis a perpetually optimistic dimwit who lives in a grotty flat in Hammersmith, London and one of the main characters inBottom. Richie is such a pompous, self-obsessed, perverted, withering soul. He is one of the two main characters in Bottom, and shares a flat at 11 Mafeking Parade, Hammersmith, London withEddie, who have known each other for at least 25 years.

characters.name: Spudgun
characters.description: Spudgun (played by Steven O'Donnell) is one of Eddie's slobbish and unemployable friends. His nickname comes from a trick he can do involving a potato, although according to Eddie it's not something most people would want to see.

characters.name: Spudgun
characters.description: Spudgun (played by Steven O'Donnell) is one of Eddie's slobbish and unemployable friends. His nickname comes from a trick he can do involving a potato, although according to Eddie it's not something most people would want to see.

characters.name: Veronica Head
characters.description: Veronica Head (played by Julia Sawalha) is the beautiful young barmaid at the Lamb and Flag, whomRichietries to woo by boasting of his false adventures at the Falklands. She later turns out to be the niece ofDick Headand has been conspiring against Richie from the start. She only appeared in the episodeParade.
